name: kiwi-schema
description: A schema-based binary format for efficiently encoding trees of data

scripts.typedefs: tsc --declaration --outDir ./dist --emitDeclarationOnly && ls *.ts | grep -v d.ts > .npmignore && echo tsconfig.json >> .npmignore
scripts.prepublishOnly: rm -rf ./dist && npm run build:cjs && npm run build:esm && npm run build:browser && npm run typedefs
